title: GHML Link Attributes
description: Attributes for ghml: links in GHML documents (spec v0.1)

model.description: LLM model identifier. Any model ID accepted by the configured backend.

oneOf.description: Single context source to inject alongside the prompt.

inline.description: For 'action' type only: stream output at the link's position rather than in a separate view.

width.description: Layout hint for 'embed' type. Ignored by other link types.

cache.description: Reuse a previously generated response when prompt + context fingerprint match.

fallback.description: Static URL to navigate to if the LLM backend is unavailable.

policy.description: Named policy identifier. The renderer looks up this policy in its policy store before dispatching the request.

placeholder.description: For 'input' type only: hint text shown inside the field when empty.

type.description: For 'input' type only: HTML input type (text, password, email, number, …). Defaults to 'text'.

linkType.description: Determines how the LLM response is rendered and whether navigation occurs.

enumDescriptions.render: Replace the current viewport with LLM-generated content.
enumDescriptions.nav: Replace viewport and push to browser history (back/forward supported).
enumDescriptions.action: Stream result inline at link position; no navigation.
enumDescriptions.input: Render an interactive input field; its value is bound to a named variable available to all links on the page.

ghmlLink.description: Parsed representation of a ghml: URI.

prompt.description: The prompt string, after variable interpolation.
